allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter ""Name=''python.exe''"" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter ""ProcessId=22140"" | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter ""ProcessId=59924"" | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter ""ProcessId=43384"" | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, Name, CommandLine | Format-List")
